view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior, but the evidence provided does not confirm whether the expected outcome was achieved. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a clear failure report, yet there is no evidence indicating that the scenario was executed or that any outcomes were captured. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary validation data is missing.
